text_block_list.text:
Gold City and I have just completed today's
training. However...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Trainer, is it okay if I stay and train a bit more?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
My modeling gig for tomorrow morning got
canceled.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
So I want to use this time to train as much as I
can. You don't mind, right?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
So I want to use this time to train as much as I
can. You don't mind, right?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yay! I knew you'd say that!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I have to use my time wisely so that others won't
think running is just my side hustle.

Brimming with motivation, Gold City continues
her training until it's almost curfew.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You could let me overdo it a little bit!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...No, you're right. I just said it myself—"overdo
it." I understand. I'll get some proper rest.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I guess I'll go back to my room and see what
international celebrities are talking about on
Umastagram.
